name: code-guards
description: Protective hooks that block editing of environment files, generated code, and lock files. Includes shell script linting.

hooks.command: for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.env*|*secrets*|*.local) echo "BLOCK: Cannot edit environment/secret files: $f" >&2; exit 1;; esac; done
for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in */Generated/*|*/obj/*|*/bin/*|*/dist/*|*/build/*) echo "BLOCK: Cannot edit generated/build output files: $f" >&2; exit 1;; esac; done

for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in */yarn.lock|*/package-lock.json|*/packages.lock.json|*/pnpm-lock.yaml|*/Cargo.lock|*/go.sum|*/poetry.lock) echo "BLOCK: Cannot edit lock files: $f" >&2; exit 1;; esac; done
for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.sh) command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && { shellcheck --severity=warning "$f" 2>&1 | head -20 || true; } || true; break;; esac; done
